pcr: PCR 2019:14 Construction Products v1.3.4 (2024-04-30); c-PCR-003 Concrete and Concrete Elements (2024-04-30)
scope: Cradle to gate (A1-A3) with options, modules A4-A5, C1-C4, D
notes: Product stage reported combined only (A1-A3 = 105); source gives no A1/A2/A3 split despite marking them declared → A1/A2/A3 = 'incl'.

Mix Description on p10 reads 'S32@56D 20mm 120SL ECOPactMAX FIB CONC' — the '@56D' denotes a 56-day (not the standard 28-day) test age, so test_age_days = 56 is inferred from this notation rather than a separately labelled 'test age' field. The trailing 'FIB CONC' tag is unexplained elsewhere in the document even though the Applications/intended use column for this row simply reads 'General'.

p16: GWP-GHG (excl. biogenic) is numerically identical to GWP-Total across every module (A1-A3=105 ... D=-15.7) despite a non-zero GWP-Biogenic (0.781 kg CO2e at A1-A3) — likely a template artifact, not corrected here. Same defect pattern as EPD-IES-0029695.

p15 primary table and p16 EN15804+A1 table: ADPE/ADPF unit labels appear swapped/mislabeled — ADPE shown as 'kg NMVOC eq.' (p15) and 'kg SO2 eq.' (p16, ADPE(A1)) instead of 'kg Sb eq.'; ADPF shown as 'kg Sb eq.' (p15) instead of MJ. Values sit at the expected magnitude for their intended indicator; does not affect the GWP figures used here. Same recurring template defect as EPD-IES-0029695 (which mislabels ADPE(A1) as 'kg SO2 eq.').

A1A3 = 105 kg CO2e/m3 sits near the low end of the typical 100-650 kg CO2e/m3 range for 1 m3 ready-mix concrete — consistent with this being a Holcim ECOPact (low-carbon, SCM-blended) mix tested at 56 days rather than 28.

Content declaration (p10) gives weight-% ranges across Holcim's general ready-mix range (general purpose cement 5-21%, aggregate 67-84%, SCM 0-11%, water 11.6-12%, admixtures ~0%), not specific proportions for VE322EAMF alone; the single product/mix declared and registered under this EPD is VE322EAMF (32 MPa).
Full registration: EPD-IES-20602:001 (revision 1); in-document registration number and source filename agree (no id mismatch).
Verification is company-wide EPD process certification (Epsten Group, Inc., Megan Blizzard; A2LA #3142.03), not a per-EPD verifier sign-off — same certifier as EPD-IES-0029695.

product_name taken verbatim from the document's own cover/header/results-table title ('VIC - Melbourne Metro - ECOPact- VE322EAMF'), including its irregular hyphenation ('ECOPact-' with a dangling hyphen before the mix code); no cleaner canonical product name is given in the document.
Total energy use omitted — source reports PERT (41.2 MJ) and PENRT (931 MJ) at A1-A3 separately (p15), no single combined figure.
